title: EmployeeUserSettings - Metadata API
description: Represents the employee-user settings used for automatically creating or syncing employee and user data in work.com orgs. This type extends the Metadata metadata type and inherits its fullName field.

emailEncoding.description: The default encoding setting is Unicode: UTF-8. Valid values include: UTF-8—Unicode (UTF-8) ISO-8859-1—General US & Western Europe (ISO-8859–1, ISO-LATIN-1) Shift_JIS—Japanese (Shift-JIS) ISO-2022-JP—Japanese (JIS) EUC-JP—Japanese (EUC-JP) x-SJIS_0213—Japanese (Shift-JIS_2004) ks_c_5601-1987—Korean (ks_c_5601-1987) Big5—Traditional Chinese (Big5) GB2312—Simplified Chinese (GB2312) Big5-HKSCS—Traditional Chinese Hong Kong (Big5–HKSCS)

enableEmployeeAutoCreateUser.description: If true, users are auto-created when a new employee record is created. The default value for this field is false.

enableEmployeeIsSourceOfTruth.description: If true, the employee record is the source of truth. The default value for this field is false.

permset.description: Represents a set of permissions that's used to grant more access to a user. You can use permission sets to grant access but not to deny access.

profile.description: Represents a user profile. A profile defines a user’s permission to perform different functions within Salesforce.

usernameSuffix.description: Represents a domain name. We create a unique login by combining this domain name with each employee’s username.

wsdl_segment:
```xml
<xsd:complexType name="EmployeeUserSettings">
  <xsd:complexContent>
    <xsd:extension base="tns:Metadata">
      <xsd:sequence>
        <xsd:element name="emailEncoding" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="enableEmployeeAutoCreateUser" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="enableEmployeeIsSourceOfTruth" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="permset" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="profile" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="usernameSuffix" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
      </xsd:sequence>
    </xsd:extension>
  </xsd:complexContent>
</xsd:complexType>
```

declarative_metadata_sample_definition.description: The following is an example EmployeeUser.settings-meta.xml force-app/main/default/settings
